sql_array: UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64('20231012083031', 'UTC', 3) WHERE event_time = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64('20231012083030', 'UTC');
SELECT event_time, toUnixTimestamp(event_time) AS unix_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64('20231012083000', 'UTC');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time BETWEEN YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64('20231012000000', 'UTC') AND YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64('20231012235959', 'UTC');
